candidate_definition_hints.text: Create motion for any robot through editing keyframe
A generalizable MuJoCo keyframe editor for creating and editing robot motion sequences. Works with any MuJoCo-compatible robot model.

candidate_glosses.text: A generalizable MuJoCo keyframe editor for creating and editing robot motion sequences. Works with any MuJoCo-compatible robot model.
